description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, characterized by a minimalist cubic design and a striking contrast between black and white exterior walls. The house features large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor living area. A spacious wooden deck surrounds a rectangular swimming pool, complemented by outdoor lounge furniture and shaded by tall palm trees. The property includes a paved driveway with a red car parked beside the house, and is landscaped with a mix of palm and deciduous trees. The rear and side facades have smaller, asymmetrically placed windows, emphasizing privacy and a clean aesthetic. The overall layout suggests a luxurious, open-plan interior with direct access to outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, cubic two-story house with flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, pool, and landscaped with palm and deciduous trees.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the black main facade, large windows, pool, wooden deck, palm trees, and driveway with a red car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white exterior wall, smaller windows, and the driveway leading to the car.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white wall, small windows, and the wooden deck with pool and outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the black facade, expansive glass windows, pool, deck, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the main facade
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no visible steps, and direct access from the driveway; no porch or overhang.
